inline_comments.message:
Path should have offeredapis/ included, else OfferedApi.rst will not be able to find pms-api-.html page

Any change in RST,verify through build logs/docs
https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/rtdv3-global-verify-master/3016/docs/offeredapis/pms-api.html
I have generated the documentation with tox and verified that the links work. So it seems to me that i doesn't have to be in the offeredpais folder.

I am not sure on that, but I am seeing ONAP rtdv3-global-verify-master job failed to get that

As I shared link earlier, you can see it gived 404:
https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/rtdv3-global-verify-master/3016/docs/offeredapis/pms-api.html

Abpove link is nothing but hyperlink under PMS API hading on page Offered API's
https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/rtdv3-global-verify-master/3016/docs/offeredapis/offeredapis.html


Moreover https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/rtdv3-global-verify-master/3016/docs/pms-api.html gives the actual API documentation, as you removed offeredapis from the path..
